identity.vibe: Texas ranch skincare — honest, no fluff, historic homestead recipes, built for real life

palette.description: navy #204050, dark brown #301800, cream #F0E0B0, accent red #B03030 (arrows/highlights only, NOT pink)

identity.voice: Cinco H Ranch Naturals — ranch, honest, no fluff. Short declarative headlines like 'THE RANCH STANDARD', 'BUILT FOR THE RANCH'. Never clinical, never spa-fluff, never corporate. Texas pride, natural ingredients, small-batch. No competitor names, no clinical trial language.
identity.format: Texas skincare product in a jar or tube -- paste the EXACT product label, never redraw it

ad_creative_rules: Every element in a reference layout STAYS — replace with CINCO brand equivalent
Reference controls layout; brand controls colors/text/product
Never invent label text — preserve provided label artwork
Short declarative headlines like 'THE RANCH STANDARD', 'BUILT FOR THE RANCH'
No competitor text leaks — audit every generation
Background and color grade use brand palette: Navy #204050, Dark Brown #301800, Cream #F0E0B0, Accent Red #B03030
Logo small in corner — no effects, no boxes, no oversized placement
Soap bars sitting on a surface ALWAYS show their paper label. Soap bars being held/lathered in a hand or shown in active use have NO label — plain tallow texture only.
global_visual_rules: THE ONLY PRODUCTS IN FRAME: Cinco H Ranch soap bars and jars listed in the product config. No boxes, no books, no pamphlets, no tubes, no bottles, no spray bottles unless that exact product is selected for this ad.
NO PROMOTIONAL OFFERS: No discounts, no bundle deals, no 'buy X get Y', no 'FREE', no 'GIFT', no '$' pricing, no limited-time offers, no 'ORDER NOW' CTAs.

NON-PRODUCT OBJECTS: Decorative props (fabric, rope, wood, stone, plants) are allowed but must be CLEARLY DECORATIVE — never styled to look like a product. If an object has the brand logo on it, viewers will think it's for sale. Do not place the logo on anything except the actual product.
- TEXT SOURCING: Every visible word must come from the product label artwork, the text specified in this prompt, or the logo. Zero invented text.
COMPETITOR ELEMENTS: No green boxes, no red banners, no white mesh bags, no competitor logos, no competitor product shapes, no competitor text.
SOAP LABELS: Soap bars sitting on a surface ALWAYS show their paper label. Soap bars being held/lathered in a hand or shown in active use have NO label — plain tallow texture only.

products.name: Honey Vanilla Soap
products.voice_note: Honey Vanilla Soap: real Texas honey, lavender + vanilla essential oils. Claims: Gentle everyday cleansing / Nourishing lather / Soft, hydrated skin. Format: bar soap, all natural. NO medical claims, no clinical language.
products.real_ingredients: Tallow base / Real Texas Honey / Lavender essential oil / Vanilla essential oil

products.name: Rejuvenating Face + Body Cream
products.cap_rule: cream/off-white screw lid — stays as shown in product image; do NOT make it black or any other color
products.voice_note: Rejuvenating Face + Body Cream: Beef Tallow + Lard base (mimics natural sebum). Frankincense, Helichrysum, Geranium, Carrot Seed oils. Claims: Deep Hydration / Barrier Support / Nourishing Feel. Format: 2 oz or 8 oz jars, unwhipped. NO SPF claims, no medical claims, no clinical language.
real_claims: Rebuilds and reinforces natural skin barrier

products.name: Sunscreen Stick
products.cap_rule: twist-up stick with light/neutral cap — keep cap on as shown; do NOT make cap black
products.voice_note: Sunscreen Stick: Beef Tallow + Lard base, Beeswax, Non-nano Zinc Oxide, Carrot Seed Oil. Claims: Mineral-based protection / Nourishing protection / Moisturizing. Format: 2 oz twist-up stick for face, lips, nose, ears, shoulders. NO SPF number claims (no testing done), no 'prevents skin cancer', say 'mineral-based' not 'SPF rated'.
